title: OAuth Certificate Expiring in 12 Days
description: SwiftIS-Prod-OAuth-ServiceKey expires March 20. All Integration Suite OAuth flows will fail.
resolutionNotes: Joule identified via scheduled scan. Both prod certs expire within 2 days - convergence risk flagged.

title: Cloud Connector X509 Expiring in 14 Days
description: SwiftIS-Prod-CloudConnector-X509 expires March 22. On-premise S4H connectivity will be blocked.
resolutionNotes: Joule correlated cert convergence risk with al001. Single maintenance window recommended.

title: BDC_DS_US_Prod Datasphere at 95%
description: US Production Datasphere space at 95%. DBX-US-Sandbox ingestion jobs contributing to daily spike.
resolutionNotes: Joule traced spike to Databricks POC job schedule. Recommended off-peak scheduling.

title: BDC_DS_Global_Prod at 93.7% Trending Critical
description: Global Prod Datasphere approaching limit. Correlated overflow risk with US Prod capacity pressure.
resolutionNotes: Joule flagged cross-space capacity risk. Escalated to BDC team lead.

title: Event Mesh Queue at 97%
description: Prod EventMesh queue near partition limit. Finance integration message backlog forming.
resolutionNotes: Joule detected throughput anomaly. Recommended partition increase and S4H flow throttling.

title: S4H Procurement Destination Degraded
description: S4H-Prod-Procurement-API at 1840ms response - 7 failures in 24h. Procurement approvals delayed.
resolutionNotes: Joule correlated with S4H maintenance window. Non-critical flows auto-paused.

title: S4H-Dev-Sandbox Destination Unreachable
description: DEV S4H sandbox unreachable - 24+ failures. SwiftIS-Dev integration testing blocked.
resolutionNotes: Requires manual check - dev sandbox may be offline for patching.

title: US Datasphere Cost Forecast 17.5% Over Budget
description: BDC_DS_US_Prod forecast $2350 vs $2000 budget. Databricks POC ingestion frequency driving overage.
resolutionNotes: Joule traced overage to DBX POC job frequency. Recommended off-peak scheduling.

title: Open Connectors Idle 45 Days
description: Open Connectors - no active jobs for 45 days. $18/month accruing with zero utilization.
resolutionNotes: Joule flagged idle service. Decommission or reassign recommended.

title: Build Process Automation Idle 22 Days
description: BPA paused Feb 15. CF runtime and license costs accruing with no active project activity.
resolutionNotes: Joule detected idle pattern. Flagged for project owner review.
